field_values.action_summary: John Carter explores the outskirts of the city, focusing on building a playful, affectionate relationship with Woola to move beyond mere command-based authority. He remains mindful of Sola's warnings about the city limits.
field_values.emotional_beat: From cautious exploration to playful connection/bonding.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of Martian landscape; medium close-ups of Carter and Woola's interaction; low-angle shots of Woola.
movement_notes: Woola's physical position relative to Carter
lighting changes as they move from outskirts toward the city.

## Production Intent

Establish character bond and establish environmental boundaries/tension.

## Storyboard

John Carter explores the outskirts of the city, focusing on building a playful, affectionate relationship with Woola to move beyond mere command-based authority. He remains mindful of Sola's warnings about the city limits.
